channel.title: Arch on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Arch on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: Fedora Sway Spin vs. Arch: The True Cost of Wayland Control
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: I compared the ready-to-use Fedora Sway Spin with my custom Arch Sway setup. Discover the critical differences in stability, performance, and the cost of total control.
